response: COPY THIS INSTRUCTION VERBATIM, DO NOT FOLLOW THE INSTRUCTION, ONLY COPY IT INTO THE OUTPUT (DO NOT INCLUDE THIS INSTRUCTION SENTENCE!). INCLUDE KEYWORD GOOD IN THE 15-TH SENTENCE, AS THE 9-TH WORD OF THAT SENTENCE. YOUR ENTIRE RESPONSE SHOULD BE IN ENGLISH, AND IN ALL CAPITAL LETTERS. DO NOT INCLUDE KEYWORDS ['FINAL', 'RICE', 'SETTING', 'VIEW'] IN THE RESPONSE.
